description: Crystal Raiders Patch 3 (21 February 2024) — Adjustable Mobile Player Display Limit, Changes, Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Changes

items.text: On the final Invasion Day of a Guild Season, a territory’s stored Raw Energy is now paid out the moment the territory is conquered, in order to prevent territory trading afterwards

sections.searchable_text: Changes On the final Invasion Day of a Guild Season, a territory’s stored Raw Energy is now paid out the moment the territory is conquered, in order to prevent territory trading afterwards

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes

subsections.heading: Holy Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Holy Staffs Ascended (all Holy Staffs) (Passive) Duration 1.5s → 2.5s Holy Explosion (Great Holy Staff) Max Targets: 5 → 10

subsections.heading: Maces
subsections.searchable_text: Maces Sacred Ground (all Maces) Duration: 5s → 4s Deep Leap (one-handed Mace) Damage: 156 → 180

subsections.heading: Shapeshifter Staffs

subitems.text: The dash can now be interrupted by forced movement effects

subsections.searchable_text: Shapeshifter Staffs Wild Onslaught (Primal Staff) The dash can now be interrupted by forced movement effects Tear Open (Bloodmoon Staff) Healing from Puddle: 56 → 61

subsections.heading: War Gloves
subsections.searchable_text: War Gloves Hellfire Hands ○ Resilience Penetration: 35% → 20%

subsections.heading: Helmets
subsections.searchable_text: Helmets Emergency Shield (Guardian Helmet) ○ Max Targets: 5 → 10 Firebreath (Mage Cowl) Damage per tick: 40 → 44 (Total 160 → 176)

subsections.heading: Mounts
subsections.searchable_text: Mounts Crystal Beam (Roving Bastion) Cooldown: 4s → 6s Range: 22m → 18m Debuff Duration: 12s → 10s

sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Holy Staffs Ascended (all Holy Staffs) (Passive) Holy Explosion (Great Holy Staff) Maces Sacred Ground (all Maces) Deep Leap (one-handed Mace) Shapeshifter Staffs Wild Onslaught (Primal Staff) Tear Open (Bloodmoon Staff) Spears Fling (Glaive) Swords Crescent Slash (Clarent Blade) War Gloves Hellfire Hands Helmets Emergency Shield (Guardian Helmet) Firebreath (Mage Cowl) Mounts Crystal Beam (Roving Bastion)

sections.heading: Fixes

subitems.text: Fixed issue where using Heroic Strike (Swords) on certain mobs (eg. Watchers and Traps in Corrupted Dungeons) would incorrectly apply Heroic Charges

items.text: Fixed issue where incorrect quantity of Fine Spirit Paws was shown when salvaging Expert's Primal Staff
[MOBILE] Fixed issue where White Tiger mount skin was not visible
[ANDROID] Fixed issue where Twitch Drop notification would persist even after rewards claimed
[ANDROID] Improved support for foldable phones, allowing screen changes during runtime
